If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Operator gallery: Kroos From Arknights Terra Wiki < [Kroos](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos "Kroos") [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#searchInput) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos "Kroos") | [File](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/File "Kroos/File") | [Story](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Story "Kroos/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Overview "Kroos/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Dialogue "Kroos/Dialogue") | Gallery | [Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Trivia "Kroos/Trivia") | ## Contents - [1Skins](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Skins) - [2Outfits](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Outfits) - [3Sprites](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Sprites) - [4Miscellaneous](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Miscellaneous) - [4.1Promotional material](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Promotional_material) - [4.2Concept Arts](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Concept_Arts) ## Skins\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Skins")\] | Base | | --- | | ![Kroos.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Kroos.png?d23c77) | One of the uniforms of [Rhodes Island](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rhodes_Island "Rhodes Island").
Reliable, light and iconic.
+Regular fit
+DeepMentality Sports learning system | ## Outfits\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Outfits")\] | the mag | | --- | | ![Kroos Skin 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Kroos_Skin_1.png?bf9023) | Kroos's Night Carnival outfit.
_The holiday's true value lies in this smile._
Witch Feast Series/the mag. An outfit that Kroos designed for herself. In addition to being fashionable, it incorporates some mechanisms to assist her with her magic tricks.
**How to obtain:**
- [3 Million Downloads Celebration](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/3_Million_Downloads_Celebration "3 Million Downloads Celebration") and [Pinus Sylvestris](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Pinus_Sylvestris_(event) "Pinus Sylvestris (event)") ( [Outfit Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), 18 [![Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Originite_Prime_icon.png/20px-Originite_Prime_icon.png?83ccc8)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime "Originite Prime"))
- [Fashion Review](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fashion_Review "Fashion Review") (since [Invitation to Wine](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Invitation_to_Wine "Invitation to Wine")) | | Moonlit Voyage
Dynamic ArtAlternate Art~~Outfit Voucher~~ | | --- | | [Original](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Original-0) [Alternate](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Alternate-0)
![Kroos Skin 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Kroos_Skin_2.png?5c294b)
![Kroos Skin 2B.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Kroos_Skin_2B.png?a3b73c) | One of Kroos's casual outfit.
_Kroos falls into a long, long dream. In that dream, she dons star and moon, and sails the ocean blue. She meets a few interesting people, and sees plenty of comedy and tragedy both. Where will her journey take her next? She's eager to find out._
Test Collection New Arrivals/Moonlit Voyage. Theme around the night sky, the moon, and oceanic voyages, the dream-like weave of star and sea feels like going on a fantastical journey, with drifting moon and stars as companions.
**How to obtain:** Reach Doctor level 80 and have a cumulative sign-in amount of 1000 days | ## Sprites\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Sprites")\] -
